channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: I asked chatbots to find me cheap flights over the holidays. The results were mixed
item.description: It’s hard to believe, but we’re only a few weeks away from Halloween, and after that comes November—and the unofficial start of the holiday season. If you travel during this time, you’ll know that finding cheap flights can be difficult.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Hungary vs Armenia live stream: how to watch FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch Hungary vs Armenia live streams online and for free, as the World Cup qualifier feels like a must-win game for both sides in Budapest.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Wigan vs Hull KR: live stream 2025 Super League Grand Final rugby
item.description: How to watch 2025 Super League Grand Final live streams online, with the Wigan vs Hull KR clash carrying the potential for a seismic changing of the guard.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: Crypto spent millions to defeat Sherrod Brown and elect allies. It's ready for a repeat in 2026
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — At a five-star resort tucked in the mountains of Jackson Hole, Wyoming, the cryptocurrency industry was celebrating a historic start to the year on Capitol Hill. Its priorities were sailing through Congress with unusual speed and one senator did not hesitate to say why. Sen.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The Apple Mac roadmap for 2025 and 2026 may have leaked – through macOS Tahoe 26
item.description: We could get new MacBook Pros, MacBook Airs, Mac minis, Mac Studios, and iMacs across the next few months.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Opinion: Apple’s translating AirPods won’t work without state’s language grads
item.description: Higher education must not retreat from language instruction under the illusion that “the machines can do it.
item.dc:creator: Annie K. Lamar, The Mercury News

item.title: Valve's Steam Deck-inspired VR headset might be launching soon – here's what we know
item.description: There's lots of buzz around a potential Steam Frame VR headset launch. Here's what we know about the mysterious device.
item.dc:creator: Hamish Hector, TechRadar

item.title: Lyft scraps feature that let drivers see how often riders tip
item.description: Lyft has scrapped a test feature that showed some drivers how often passengers tip before accepting a ride.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, The Hill

item.title: Lyft plans fleet of hundreds of Tensor Robocars from 2027
item.description: Lyft Inc. is partnering with autonomous vehicle developer Tensor Auto Inc. to deploy a fleet of hundreds of robotaxis in Europe and North America starting in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple to move health, fitness divisions to services in reorganization
item.description: Apple Inc. is preparing to expand the roles of some top executives in response to the pending departure of longtime Chief Operating Officer Jeff Williams, according to people familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft warns university employees are being hit by payroll attacks, so stay on your guard
item.description: Payroll pirate is targeting thousands of university employees, with some losing their salaries in attacks.
item.dc:creator: Sead Fadilpašić, TechRadar

item.title: Oops - Microsoft Defender issues false end-of-life warning for SQL Server 2017 and 2019
item.description: Microsoft Defender incorrectly reports SQL Server 2017 and 2019 as end-of-life - but don't worry, it's an error.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Intel bets on on-device AI and US fabs to power the next generation of PCs
item.description: Intel unveiled its Core Ultra series 3 processors on Thursday, the first client chips built on its 18A process node and manufactured in Arizona, as enterprises gear up for a wave of PC refreshes driven by Microsoft’s October 2025 end-of-support deadline for Windows 10.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple doubles security bounty at Hexagon 2025
item.description: If you know your way around platform security, you don’t need to sell your discoveries to dodgy surveillance-as-a-service firms — Apple will make you a millionaire.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UK watchdog targets Google's 'strategic' role in search ads and a competitive market
item.description: Britain’s antitrust watchdog is labeling Google a “strategic” player in the online search advertising market, paving the way for regulators to force the company to change its business practices to ensure more competition in that market.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 US sales data for its first three months is in, and it's outpacing the previous record set by PlayStation 4
item.description: The PlayStation 4 sold 2.2 million units in the US in its first three months - Nintendo Switch 2 has just beaten that record.
item.dc:creator: Rhys Wood, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch South Korea vs Brazil for *FREE*
item.description: Here's our quick guide on how to watch South Korea vs Brazil with both teams already qualified for the 2026 World Cup.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Princess of Wales suggests parents should put down the phone to combat social discontent
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The Princess of Wales has a suggestion for parents: Please put down the phone. Kate, as she is commonly known, collaborated with adult development researcher Robert Waldinger to warn that technology is contributing to an epidemic of disconnection that is hurting family relationships.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Greenland's leader hails EU as trusted friend and urges investment in its minerals
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Greenland’s leader on Wednesday thanked the European Union for being “a trusted friend” and urged the 27-nation bloc to invest in his country’s mineral resources, renewable energy, airports and internet services.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: React JS library moving from Meta to the Linux Foundation
item.description: React, a popular open source JavaScript library for web and native user interfaces, will be transferred from Meta to the React Foundation, a new organization being formed under the Linux Foundation. The new foundation will be the home for React, React Native, and supporting projects.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Computer mice can eavesdrop on private conversations, researchers discover
item.description: High-end computer mice can be used to eavesdrop on the voice conversations of nearby PC users, researchers from the University of California, Irvine, have shown in a new proof-of-concept demonstration.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: SolarWinds launches AI agent to automate IT operations, speed incident response
item.description: SolarWinds this week announced its AI Agent and additional AI capabilities across its portfolio that are aimed at helping enterprise organizations to move from a reactive mode of IT operations to a more autonomous, proactive state of operational resilience.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Deloitte’s AI governance failure exposes critical gap in enterprise quality controls
item.description: A breakdown in AI governance at Deloitte Australia has forced the consulting giant to refund part of an AU$440,000 (US$290,000) government contract after AI-generated fabrications were included in a final report, exposing vulnerabilities that analysts said are symptomatic of broader challenges as en
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Key crypto agency on uncertain footing after White House pulls nominee
item.description: The White House’s decision to pull its nominee to lead the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has left the financial regulator in an increasingly uncertain position, with just one remaining commissioner in place to tackle President Trump’s ambitious crypto agenda.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How GitHub won software development
item.description: In the late 2000s, I was working at Borland, the formerly high-flying software development tools company. My boss and I would regularly sit around tossing out ideas for new products. The Internet was really hitting its stride, and we saw numerous opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tesla offers cheaper versions of 2 electric vehicles in bid to win back market share in tough year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tesla rolled out new, cheaper versions of two of its electric car models on Tuesday in hopes the offerings will help revive flagging sales but investors dumped its stock anyway.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Kentucky lawsuit says Roblox fails to protect children on its popular online gaming platform
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — Kentucky's attorney general claimed Tuesday that the online gaming platform Roblox has become a “playground for predators” as he announced a lawsuit accusing the company of lax child safety measures.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DevRev’s AI agent hangout targets worker productivity, data integration
item.description: Imagine a city hub where a multitude of AI agents can gather, interact, and converse. Office workers are more like sentries — seeing and interacting with the information generated by agents at the hub.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ChatGPT to evolve into an AI operating system as OpenAI opens doors to third-party apps
item.description: OpenAI has launched apps inside ChatGPT, a new feature allowing users to discover and use third-party applications directly within the chat interface.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Deloitte to partially refund Australian government for report with apparent AI-generated errors
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Deloitte Australia will partially refund the 440,000 Australian dollars ($290,000) paid by the Australian government for a report that was littered with apparent AI-generated errors, including a fabricated quote from a federal court judgment and references to nonexistent
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco (Nasdaq:CSCO) is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Cisco is focusing on strategic AI initiatives and partnerships across various regions to build and power AI data centers and ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Network World
